_meta.source: Benton / Linn / Marion / Polk county permit offices

fencing.note: Most fence replacements under 6ft do not require a building permit; verify property-line setbacks.

decks.note: Any deck > 30in above grade requires a building permit + footing inspection.

kitchenBath.note: Permit required when plumbing/electrical is moved; ventilation changes trigger mechanical review.
